content: Photo Hunt [v0.20.2 Extra] [Moochie] Overview 剧情概要 The story is happening around your character, who was unwilingly sent to his mother house. The city you have known before is now like different - so much has changed. Above all, after just one mistake you lost your siblings trust. No money, no love, only your new camera and desire to turn things upside down… 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说 建模引擎：Daz Studio 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：欧美风 版本信息 当前版本：0.20.2 Extra 发行日期：2026-02-22 Changelog 更新日志 N/A Developer（入正地址） Patreon SubscribeStar Discord Twitter 落谦酱便利贴 PS …… 关于汉化补丁 AI模型：DeepSeek-V3 翻译作者：落谦 制作日期：2026-03-01 PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 荤图 DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁） Win（PC端） 下载链接： 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN 英文原版：VIKINGFILE AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁 解压英文原版压缩包文件 将汉化补丁rpa文件放入game文件夹中 启动exe游戏，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ Android（安卓端） 下载链接： 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN 英文原版：VIKINGFILE AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE 主体APK：GOFILE 主体APK：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载英文原版、AI意译汉化补丁和主体APK 安装APK文件 启动游戏，放行所有权限 这时游戏会闪退，如果没有闪退，就自己手动大退 然后解压英文原版压缩包文件 将英文原版game文件夹中的所有文件及文件夹和汉化补丁rpa文件一起移动到以下路径： 1 Documents/RenPy_Saves/com.luoqian.PhotoHunt/game 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可 PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ iOS（苹果端） 环境配置： 苹果端需使用Spark模拟器进行游玩 Spark模拟器AppStore有售 下载链接： 英文原版：PIXELDRAIN 英文原版：VIKINGFILE AI意译汉化补丁：GOFILE AI意译汉化补丁：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载英文原版和AI意译汉化补丁 打开Spark模拟器导入英文原版压缩包文件，不用解压，不用解压，不用解压，重要的事情说三遍 然后将汉化补丁rpa文件移动到以下路径： 1 我的iPhone/Spark/games/PhotoHunt/game 最后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可 PS：移动端如果看不全路径，请向左滑动代码块。 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ 宇宙安全声明！ 本文章仅供学习与交流，请勿商用或非法传播 落谦不对因使用本文所产生的任何问题负责

content: Summer Crush [Ep.8 v1.0.3] [Wet n’ Juicy Games] Overview 剧情概要 《夏日恋情》是一部面向成年人的视觉小说。故事情节将完全取决于你做出的选择。你将扮演一个青年，一个已经计划好他的乏味成年生活的青年。现在，他正在等待夏天的结尾。可能会出现什么转机呢？ 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Daz Studio 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：欧美风 版本信息 当前版本：Episode 8 - 1.03 发行日期：2026-02-07 Changelog 更新日志 The eighth and final episode of Summer Crush is now available. New scenes, animations, achievements, and music await you. Well, business as usual! I realize I’ve been dragging my feet. In May 2025, when I sat down to develop the final episode, I thought I’d have it all finished in time for the game’s third anniversary, November 25th. And now, on November 24th, I’m looking at the game’s progress and realizing there’s still a ton of work to do: the animations aren’t ready, some renders aren’t finished, the music is missing, and there’s no sign of any translations into other languages. This post is partly for myself – if you’re the only one responsible for everything, don’t set deadlines! You’ll never make it… Nevertheless, I apologize. The game was supposed to be finished sooner, but I couldn’t do it before. But now it’s done! I hope you enjoy it. Thank you for devoting your precious time to my little game. content:
Cross Realms [v0.4Public] [DuskDuck] Overview 剧情概要 On the first day of your college life, you and a group of friends are sucked into a vortex. When you wake up, you realize you’re in a foreign place - this is not Earth. As you explore this new world, you discover it’s a Qi cultivation realm, where power determines everything. Spoiler There are nine Realms, each controlled by a dominant race: Humans, Demons, Deities, Spiritual Beasts, and more. Each Realm has a “spring” - a flow of Qi energy harvested from the Void, the space between Realms. Because of these springs, peace between the Realms is fragile and rarely lasts long. You arrive during the longest period of peace ever known, but how long will this so-called ‘peace’ really last?
As your journey continues, you uncover more secrets about these Realms. Someone in the shadows has been plotting and orchestrating your arrival. Will you be able to stand up for yourself in a world where many see you as nothing more than a useless ant?
The answer are yours to find.

content: Eternum [v0.9.5 Public] [Caribdis] Overview 剧情概要 You’re moving with your best friend to the city of Kredon, home to some of the best schools and universities in the country, to continue your studies. However, in Kredon, there’s only one thing everyone talks about: ETERNUM—the virtual, hyper-reality MMORPG game released a few years ago that revolutionized the world of technology. Spoiler With a neural implant that recreates the five senses, it becomes impossible to distinguish between the game and the real world. Thousands of servers form the network of Eternum: from colorful, magic-filled fantasy worlds to foggy sci-fi cities, no world is beyond reach. Nevertheless, looking beyond the surface, there’s a darker side to this pretty facade: black markets, torture, rape, illegal content trafficking, unlawful assemblies, data theft… Eternum follows the rules of no man. For some reason, governments turn a blind eye to this; there’s no regulation and no control. Some say it’s because the game is highly addictive, some say it’s because the market moves millions of dollars daily, some say those in power have been bribed, and others say… there’s something else going on. And you? What’s your role in this story? Well… That’s up to you now. 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Honey Select 2 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：亚洲风 版本信息 当前版本：0.9.5 Public 发行日期：2026-01-21 Changelog 更新日志 2050+ new images 90+ new animations 20900+ new lines of code 42+ new music tracks 100+ new sound effects Several render and code fixes Developer（入正地址） Itch.io Patreon Discord SubscribeStar Twitter 落谦酱便利贴 PS 安卓是用作者的apk文件，作者集成在压缩包里，还是和之前一样的移动文件，当然也可以用官网itch的汉化，我就懒得搬运了，就上传我自己玩的汉化上来。 关于汉化补丁 AI模型：DeepSeek-V3 翻译作者：落谦 制作日期：2026-02-09 PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 素图 荤图 DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁） Win/Linux（PC端） 下载链接： content: Pale Carnations [Ch.4 Up.6 Public] [Mutt & Jeff] Overview 剧情概要 In Pale Carnations, step into the shoes of a tightly wound pre-med student pulled head first into a world of debauchery thanks to the influence of a waning childhood friend. As the newest employee at the Carnation Club, navigate your part in a series of cruel erotic games and sexual encounters. Will you give into your sadistic urges and be enticed by the club’s wealth and hedonism? Or perhaps at the end of it all, a flower of romance will bud, pushing you to leave the brothel’s sordid business behind. Features a variety of intersecting storylines that sees you guide the performance of three women desperately competing for the brothel’s grand prize, uncover backroom dealings steeped in intrigue, and maneuver the day-to-day social life of a man ill at ease with his basest impulses. 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Honey Select 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：亚洲风 版本信息 当前版本：Chapter 4 - Update 6 - Public 发行日期：2025-10-10 Changelog 更新日志 2,761 images 104 animations 55,714 words Edwin meeting Rosalind in the prologue has been reshot (81 images), and 7 animations have been added to - that scene. Developer（入正地址） Itch.io Patreon Discord 落谦酱便利贴 PS 顶级神作，极致细腻的文笔配上极端的剧情，如同水火相容。 博文更新日志 2026.01.15 17:00 修复百分比号%%的报错bug。 2026.01.25 22:00 修复[[八面玲珑]的bug。 关于汉化补丁 AI模型：DeepSeek-V3 翻译作者：落谦 制作日期：2026-01-25 PS：由于AI本身会出现幻觉，那么文本上下文中，偶尔会出现人名翻译误差，以及中英文夹杂的句子。目前落谦也只能统一主要角色的人名，但难免还是会有个别遗漏，毕竟落谦只有一个人，时间和精力确实有限。至于一些小名、昵称、缩写称呼、称谓、地点、事件，以及专有名词，还有类似sister、brother这种一词多义的单词，则需要人工边玩边修正。当然，如果在统一主要角色人名时，发现了相关专有名词，也会顺手统一一下。还请大家多多谅解，总之不妨碍游玩，如果介意，还请勿玩。 免死金牌： 落谦的汉化补丁，无论是 AI 意译版本还是逐句意译版本，都远不及原文或其他大佬的汉化版本。与其他汉化大佬不同，落谦并非为了为爱发电，而是纯粹希望提升文笔，所以会加入更多文化色彩，比如网络热梗？古诗词？谚语？俗语？网文小说梗？等等？还请高抬贵手，别再阴阳怪气我了。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 素图 DOWNLOAD（汉化补丁） Win/Linux（PC端） 下载链接： content: Bloody Anomaly [v0.1] [Dejavu] Overview 剧情概要 The outbreak of the BA26 virus claimed thousands of lives and temporarily wiped out the usual rules. A vaccine with 93% effectiveness restored the illusion of safety, but you were unlucky, one of the 7% for whom it didn’t work… Well… there was no turning back. Rumors spread that some of the infected were exhibiting strange, almost vampiric behavior. Spoiler: More Journalist Sera wrote: “They could no longer eat regular food. Their manners, habits, appetite… everything changed. I don’t know what was happening to them, but it was terrifying.” And what about you? Once an orphan with nothing in your pocket, you clawed your way to the top, building a chemical empire and becoming a millionaire. Power, money, knowledge, everything was in your hands. Risk and criminal connections had long been part of your life, just like the church you built in the heart of the city, a towering mansion disguised as a place of worship. And while the rumors kept spreading, no one knew what would happen next. The first wave may have been only a test, and the real consequences had yet to appear. If the second stage of the virus begins, everything could change overnight. Oh… the vaccine does not work on you… And then you will have to choose: fight to survive or be consumed by the virus with no chance of recovery. 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Honey Select 2 运行引擎：Unity 游戏画风：亚洲风 版本信息 当前版本：0.1 发行日期：2025-12-26 Changelog 更新日志 N/A Developer（入正地址） Patreon Itch.io Discord 落谦酱便利贴 PS 新作，质量感觉很ok。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 素图 DOWNLOAD（官中） Win/Linux（PC端） 下载链接： 官中原版：GOFILE 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版 解压压缩包文件 启动exe文件，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ Android（安卓端） 下载链接： 官中原版：GOFILE 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版 安装APK文件 启动游戏，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ 宇宙安全声明！ 本文章仅供学习与交流，请勿商用或非法传播 落谦不对因使用本文所产生的任何问题负责

content: Champion of Realms [v0.104] [Zimon] Overview 剧情概要 在一个由混乱而生的世界里，古代诸神为了避免世界末日的冲突，将他们的后代分开。他们为每个孩子创造了三个不同的时间维度，并将孩子们生存的关键任务委托给一个人：勇士。 数万年以来，这位冠军一直守护着三维空间。但现在，这位冠军却消失得无影无踪。 尽管主角竭尽全力，他还是被迫参加一场致命的比赛，以决定未来的冠军……以及所有人的命运。他能活下来吗？还是会被命运的重压压垮？ 幸运的是，在这场惊险的冒险中，他并不是孤单一人。几位值得信赖、美丽的盟友将与他并肩前行。他们齐心协力，一定能克服最艰难的挑战，体验最美妙的乐趣。 你还在等什么？冒险就在眼前…… 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说 建模引擎：Koikatsu Sunshine 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：日系风 版本信息 当前版本：0.104 发行日期：2025-10-28 Changelog 更新日志 Main Story Events ragon Events New card Heramael new lewds Heramael alt lewds Taile outfit Taile interactions redone Maribel interactions Hug - Headpat New fishing companion Izanami New 24 achievements New fan arts Naming saves New music and sounds Launcher new features Developer（入正地址） Oppaiman 落谦酱便利贴 PS 日系画风，喜欢玩原神鸣潮的有福了。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 素图 DOWNLOAD（官中） Win/Linux（PC端） 下载链接： 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版 解压压缩包文件 启动exe文件，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ Android（安卓端） 下载链接： 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版 安装APK文件 启动游戏，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ iOS（苹果端） 环境配置： 苹果端需使用Spark模拟器进行游玩 Spark模拟器AppStore有售 下载链接： 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版 打开Spark模拟器导入官中原版压缩包文件，不用解压，不用解压，不用解压，重要的事情说三遍 然后启动游戏，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ 宇宙安全声明！ 本文章仅供学习与交流，请勿商用或非法传播 落谦不对因使用本文所产生的任何问题负责

content: That New Teacher [v0.8.0] [RogueOne] Overview 剧情概要 You’ve just been hired at a prestigious and unconventional institute of higher learning, known for its ground-breaking curriculum, radical pedagogical methods, and strict disciplinary policies. Your new position is unlike any other: you are The Enforcer. As The Enforcer, you are the sole authority responsible for administering discipline across the student body, with complete discretion. The Institute’s enigmatic benefactors have established a controversial behavioral system known as the PARE Program (Performance and Accountability through Reward and Enforcement). This initiative empowers you to manage students through a carefully structured balance of incentives and consequences, based on their academic performance, conduct, and adherence to institutional expectations. 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Honey Select 2 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：亚洲风 版本信息 当前版本：0.8.0 Public 发行日期：2025-12-20 Changelog 更新日志 33,000 New Words 1800 New Images 97 New Animations 12 new unlockable photos! content: Breeze of Passion [v9.01 Extra] [L7team] Overview 剧情概要 《Breeze of Passion》是一款成人游戏。你扮演一名年轻小伙，搬到海边小镇，协助复兴一家酒店。这部视觉小说满是漂亮女孩、火辣 MILF 和意想不到的剧情反转，并配有高质量画面与劲爆动画。 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：沙盒视觉小说 建模引擎：Daz Studio 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：欧美风 版本信息 当前版本：9.01 Extra 发行日期：2025-05-14 Changelog 更新日志 Hey there, everyone! We are overjoyed to finally be able to present you with the new big expansion for Breeze of Passion — Deep Inspection! This is not just another game update, but a standalone story sequel with a huge amount of content! We worked very hard to make it special and give you the opportunity to be with your favorite characters again in the vortex of events that awaits you! When it comes to this expansion, we definitely didn’t waste time. It features about 5300(!!!) new images and tons and tons of animations, including full-length mocap pole dances of various girls. We’ve gotten access to XSens motion capture equipment, including StretchSense Studio Pro gloves. We are currently experimenting with it and trying to figure out how it can improve the quality of our games. If you didn’t already know, half of our team consists of girls. Which means they take part in creating many of the scenes you see in the game. Also, a lot of mocap animations in this update were made by the same girls At the same time, we can proudly say that we do not use AI in our creative process. For example, the OST, among many other things, was licensed from real composers. Absolutely everything you see in the world created by L7team is produced by living and breathing people, who love their craft and try very hard to make sure you have a lot of fun with the game! Next on the menu is the final update of MILFs of Sunville. We are already starting to work on it. But don’t you worry. Just like with Breeze of Passion, you can look forward to more unforgettable and amazing content to be added for that game, even after that. By supporting us, you help preserve the community of people who share your passions and work hard to make you a little happier ❤ Enjoy the Game! content: The Better Deal [v0.8b] [Ze-gam-eZ] Overview 剧情概要 A story-focused, highly animated visual novel with several love interests, both male and female. 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 建模引擎：Daz Studio 运行引擎：Ren’Py 游戏画风：欧美风 版本信息 当前版本：0.8b 发行日期：2025-12-18 Changelog 更新日志 The update contains some bug fixes, fixed typos and translations. This update covers Chapter 3 — the climax of the story. While the earlier parts of the game focused on determining the main heroine’s love interest, here you’ll be making choices between life and death. And of course, all your previous decisions still have a major impact on how the story unfolds. The update adds 1,657 images, 34 animations, 5 music tracks, and 34 sound effects. In terms of content volume, it’s roughly equal to the very first release of the game (the one on Steam). However, because the story branches extensively, each individual path won’t be very long — which I hope is clear. This update includes all the bad endings. If you manage to complete this chapter, everything ahead will be only good endings, plus one or two “gray” ones. content:
Wild Cats [v0.3 Public] [LopaPhi] Overview 剧情概要 You are a highly anticipated up and coming volleyball star. Or rather, you were up until you destroyed your shoulder and your prospects along with it by overworking yourself. Now you’re just a nobody who drowned your sorrows away with a series of poor life choices. Spoiler This story takes place after a wake up call following a year of wallowing in despair with a life that spiralled downhill under the shadow of the star volleyball prospect you once were. You have just received a vague invitation for a meeting from the Dean of Baskerville State University, a highly prestigious university, regarding a potential scholarship when no other universities would give the current you a second glance.
The condition of this scholarship however would turn out to be facing your demons as you return to the sport you turned your back on in a new role, becoming the coach of the school’s women’s volleyball team.
But little did you know that facing your demons would be the easiest part of this task as the team is riddled with fatal problems, each threatening to end your scholarship left, right, and centre! Yet by earnestly facing these girls and their issues with your eyes wide open, you might just end up growing in a way you never thought you would. Are you ready to coach the BSU Wild Cats and lead them to victory?

Voice acting and moans: Captivating voice acting and immersive sounds intensify each scene, including provocative moans and whispers. content: The Neighbor’s Wife 2 [v1.02] [AibanWork] Overview 剧情概要 某天，被住在隔壁的￥彩乃太太邀请共进晚餐… “那个呢，其实今天，我丈夫会稍微早点回来 然后呢，他说想感谢你平时的关照… 想邀请你今晚，一起吃个饭。” 那天晚上，和彩乃太太还有她丈夫一起吃喝… 之后丈夫先生喝醉了，就那样睡了过去。 啊…糟了，看到彩乃太太的臀部后，我勃起了。 “那就没办法了呢～毕竟都说了要好好款待你的… 我得负起责任才行吧？” 虽然不知道为什么，但我正在睡着的丈夫身旁和他太太做爱。 彩乃太太的臀部、胸部、小穴，全部都让人欲罢不能… 明明丈夫先生还在旁边睡着，我却在彩乃太太的身体里射了很多。 游戏信息 游戏类型 游戏玩法：视觉小说 角色立绘：手绘立绘 运行引擎：Unity 游戏画风：日系画风 版本信息 当前版本：1.02 发行日期：2025-09-05 Developer（入正地址） DLsite Ci-en Twitter Fanbox Steam 落谦酱便利贴 PS 步兵来着。 落谦酱点评 游戏预览图 荤图 DOWNLOAD（官中） Win/Linux（PC端） 下载链接： 官中原版：GOFILE 官中原版：VIKINGFILE 安装步骤： 下载官中原版。 解压压缩包文件 启动exe文件，选择简体中文即可 温馨提示： 如果打不开链接，则需要科学上网，没有梯子可以参考此处——魔戒 如果看不懂安装步骤，可以参考小破站的教程——视频教程 如果觉得本文对你有帮助，欢迎在爱发电投喂落谦——爱发电 你的支持是我更新的最大动力！ 宇宙安全声明！ 本文章仅供学习与交流，请勿商用或非法传播 落谦不对因使用本文所产生的任何问题负责

content:
Mayfly [v0.2 Reset] [JasonTon] Overview 游戏概述 “The city’s sewers stink of blood and rust. Portraits of the wealthy and powerful line the streets, attempting to cover up the heinous crimes they’ve committed.”
“Is it truly brightness and warmth that meets you after suffering?” your life.
Spoiler The story is set in the city of Devon, the country’s only mega city. Plagued by a glaring wealth gap, Devon eventually divided into the Uppercity, where company execs and corpos live amidst opulence and luxury, and the Undercity, where factory workers and gangsters, including triads, dwell.
A decade ago, a phenomenon of unknown origin resulted in the sudden emergence of superpowers among individuals in and around the city, primarily among teenagers. However, this unexpected development presented a formidable challenge for the government, as these superpowered individuals started to engage in criminal activities. In particular, they targeted the Uppercity due to deep-rooted inequality, resorting to acts such as kidnapping and murder of the wealthy.
To tackle the rising crime rates, the government is compelled to implement two bills: the Vigilante Act and the Superpowers Act. The former empowers selected individuals with superpowers to go beyond traditional law enforcement measures to combat criminals, while the latter treats superpowered individuals differently from regular humans, eliminating age restrictions and establishing dedicated prisons for them.
Over time, superpowered crime in Devon steadily decreased thanks to the state-funded Vigilantes who are entrusted with the task of upholding justice. However, as the Vigilante force expanded, the balance started to shift as some Vigilantes with concealed motives became a new source of instability in the city. Additionally, after the initial surge of superpowers, no new superpowers have emerged in Devon. This results in a growing public demand for the abolition of the Vigilante Bill, and a change in public perception of Vigilantes from once-revered heroes to a more critical stance.
In such a setting, where you are a member of the Vigilantes, are you truly willing to let others dictate your fate? I believe the answer is unequivocally “Never.” Every decision you make, whether significant or seemingly inconsequential, has the potential to impact the relationships and alliances you form during your journey.
Is it to live fleetingly like a mayfly in this superficially vibrant city, or to leave a lasting legacy as a legend in the streets?
“The power to determine your destiny rests in your hands.”
